mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ha_battle_record (id, user_id, battle_type, topic, user_choice, judge_summary, changed_stance, messages, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{battleType}, #{topic}, #{userChoice}, #{judgeSummary}, #{changedStance}, #{messages}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, battle_type, topic, user_choice, judge_summary, changed_stance, messages, created_at FROM ha_battle_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ha_battle_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ha_battle_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND changed_stance = 1
